MOTION And Notice Of Motion For Additional Post Judgment Attorney'S Fees And Costs; Memo Of Points
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Continued To Sep-27-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: stephen thomas, esq., 707.254.7100, for plaintiff lodging property brokers, inc..
ivo keller, esq., buchalter nemer, 415.227.0900, for defendant jane chang.

RULING: no argument. the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT JANE CHANG's MOTION For Additional Post Judgment Attorney'S Fees And Costs is Continued to September 27, 2012. Plaintiff shall file and lodge a courtesy copy of its opposing points and authorities if it has one to department 302 no later than 4pm September 11 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. The only "opposition" papers that the Court received are the declarations of Mr. Cramer and Mr. Thomas. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
